tool_args.label: Open Road Tolling conversion
tool_args.raw_text: TBTA completed the conversion of its seven bridges and two tunnels to Open Road Tolling (ORT)

payload.description: TBTA conversion of its seven bridges and two tunnels to Open Road Tolling, completed in 2017.

evidence_refs.source_quote: TBTA completed the conversion of its seven bridges and two tunnels to Open Road Tolling (ORT)

tool_args.label: Grand Street ADA elevator construction
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT is constructing elevators at 8 subway stations across New York City in support of improving accessibility to the stations in compliance with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA).

payload.description: NYCT elevator construction for ADA accessibility, including installation activity adjacent to Grand Street subway station properties.

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYCT is constructing elevators at 8 subway stations across New York City

tool_args.raw_text: NYCT is constructing elevators at 8 subway stations across New York City

payload.description: Replacement for malformed implemented_by treatment_component-to-entity row; the source states NYCT is constructing the ADA elevators.

tool_args.label: Congestion pricing implementation
tool_args.raw_text: In 2019, the State Legislature passed a law directing the MTA to implement congestion pricing in partnership with NYCDOT and NYSDOT.

payload.description: MTA implementation of congestion pricing in partnership with NYCDOT and NYSDOT, as directed by the 2019 State Legislature law.

evidence_refs.source_quote: directing the MTA to implement congestion pricing in partnership with NYCDOT and NYSDOT

tool_args.raw_text: State Legislature passed a law directing the MTA to implement congestion pricing
